IceCreamBuff.101.2: Slows down the passage of time for a limited duration.
IceCreamBuff.102.2: Resets the Patience bar of current customers and pauses all customers' Patience depletion for a limited duration.
IceCreamBuff.103.2: Doubles all order scores for a limited duration.
IceCreamBuff.105.2: Automatically and perfectly completes all orders for a limited duration.
